title: Property Consultant - Ramky Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Ramky Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
